data.name: label2.Text
data.value: You've entered an ancient castle, but the key is lost! To find the key and come out, you'll need to solve a few puzzles... This quest requires teamwork. Communication between players is crucial, and success depends on how well you can discuss and make decisions together. You'll see the question and the hint, and will be able to talk to each other in the chat. If you get 3 wrong answers, the Big Boss will sendyou a hint to help you further. If you get 3 wrong answers again after the hint, you'll have the option to reveal the correct answer and move on. But note - the Big Boss is watching you. If you reveal the answer 3 times or more - you'll lose the game. All three of you must enter the correct answer to move on. Think wisely, be patient, and enjoy the game ;)
